basic_details.organization_name: Ministry of Road Transport & Highways, Govt. of India
basic_details.short_information: NHIDCL Deputy Manager Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 85 vacancies across India. Candidates with B.Tech/B.E Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 09-05-2026, and closes on 08-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NHIDCL website, nhidcl.com.

qualification.education_qualification: Qualified GATE (Civil Engineering) in any of the year 2024 / 2025 / 2026 with a valid GATE score

selection_process: Best of GATE Score (Civil Engineering) in 2024/2025/2026
Best of valid GATE Score in Civil Engineering (2024/2025/2026)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the NHIDCL Recruitment Portal, accessible on the official website https://www.nhidcl.com under the Recruitment Section. Hard copy applications will not be accepted under any circumstances. The online portal will be active from 09-05-2026 (10:00 AM) to 08-06-2026 (5:00 PM). Candidates must ensure their Name and Date of Birth are entered exactly as they appear on records during portal registration.
seo_tags: NHIDCL Deputy Manager Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 85 Posts
